source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/04_G1717CW 외 7종/03_설계개발 출력/09_Label & Packaging/A-TCF-10-102_Labelling and packaging[G1417, G1717] (Rev.00).docx

document.title: Proposed Labeling & Packaging For X-ray Detector G1417CW/G1717CW/G1417FW/G1717FW G1417CWP/G1717CWP/G1417FWP/G1717FWP

sourceSummary.oneLine: Proposed labeling and packaging report for G1417 and G1717 series X-ray Detector models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines product label, single unit packaging, transport packaging, operating and storage environment, and symbol descriptions for the listed X-ray Detector models.
keyPoints: Revision 0 dated November/25/2024 is listed as Establishment.
Product label sizes include G1417 Series Detector Label, G1717 Series Detector Label, Detector Sub Label, and Shipment Label at 74.5mm * 58.2mm.
Operating and storage environment limits are provided for temperature, humidity, and pressure.
Symbol descriptions include Manufacturer, Date of manufacture/Country of manufacture, Serial number, Medical device, WEEE, and Degrees of protection provided by enclosures.

concepts.name: Degrees of protection provided by enclosures
concepts.pageTarget: Degrees of protection provided by enclosures
concepts.evidence: Degrees of protection provided by enclosures

evidence.claim: The document is a proposed labeling and packaging report for X-ray Detector models.
evidence.evidenceText: Proposed Labeling & Packaging For X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The report number and revision are A-TCF-10-102 (rev.00).
Revision 0 is dated November/25/2024 and has revision contents Establishment.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev. No. 0 Rev. date November/25/2024 Revision contents Establishment

evidence.claim: The listed detector models are G1417CW, G1717CW, G1417FW, G1717FW, G1417CWP, G1717CWP, G1417FWP, and G1717FWP.
evidence.pageTarget: G1417 and G1717 X-ray detector models

evidence.claim: The product label set includes G1417 Series Detector Label, G1717 Series Detector Label, Detector Sub Label, and Shipment Label.
evidence.evidenceText: G1417 Series Detector Label; G1717 Series Detector Label; Detector Sub Label; Shipment Label

evidence.claim: Each listed product label size is 74.5mm * 58.2mm.
evidence.evidenceText: G1417 Series Detector Label 74.5mm * 58.2mm; G1717 Series Detector Label 74.5mm * 58.2mm; Detector Sub Label 74.5mm * 58.2mm; Shipment Label 74.5mm * 58.2mm

evidence.claim: Single unit packaging includes Box-Packing, inner lower and upper cushions, and Master Box-Detector ve.
evidence.evidenceText: Single unit packaging size No. Item Size 1. Box-Packing ... 6. Master Box-Detector ve

evidence.claim: Transport packaging lists Power Supply Box Packing, Battery Packing, and Recharger Packing with quantity 1 each.
evidence.evidenceText: No. Product name Qty 1. Power Supply Box Packing 1 2. Battery Packing 1 3. Recharger Packing 1

evidence.claim: Storage and transport temperature limits are -20 to 55 degrees C.
Operation temperature limits are 10 to 35 degrees C.
Storage and transport humidity limits are 10 to 95 percent H.R.
Operation humidity limits are 20 to 75 percent H.R.
Storage and transport pressure limits are 500 to 1060 hPa.
Operating pressure limits are 700 to 1060 hPa.

The document describes symbols including Manufacturer, Date of manufacture/Country of manufacture, Serial number, Temperature limit, Humidity limit, Pressure limitation, WEEE, Keep dry, Fragile handle with care, This side up, 3-layer stacking, Medical device, and radio transmitting device marking.
evidence.evidenceText: Description of Symbols ... Manufacturer ... Date of manufacture/ Country of manufacture ... Serial number ... Temperature limit ... Humidity limit ... Pressure limitation ... WEEE ... Keep dry ... Fragile, handle with care ... This side up ... 3-layer stacking ... Medical device ... Marks it contains radio transmitting device.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the source text; metadata only provides authoritySignal as general.
No standards are explicitly identified in the source text.
